summary: The diff implements most of the required upload and OCR extraction features. Frontend components (FileUploadZone, UploadRecordForm, AddRecordPage tabs, types, ocrExtraction lib) are present and well-structured. Backend shows uploadFile-related storage scaffolding. However, critical backend endpoints are not fully visible in the truncated diff, and the OCR extraction appears to be performed entirely client-side rather than in the Motoko actor as required by the constraints.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend OCR processing endpoint (extractRecordFromFile) that performs text extraction on stored file bytes and returns structured fields (detected date, test name/value pairs, raw text).
missing_requirements.reason: The OCR extraction logic is implemented entirely in frontend/src/lib/ocrExtraction.ts (client-side). No backend extractRecordFromFile endpoint is visible in the diff. The constraint explicitly states all OCR logic must remain within the single Motoko actor.

missing_requirements.requirement: listUploadedFiles backend endpoint returning metadata (file ID, upload timestamp, MIME type) for all files uploaded by the calling principal.
missing_requirements.reason: No listUploadedFiles endpoint is visible in the truncated backend/main.mo and no corresponding frontend query hook is mentioned in the file summaries.

missing_requirements.requirement: deleteUploadedFile backend endpoint to remove a file by ID, scoped to the owning principal.
missing_requirements.reason: While useDeleteUploadedFile is referenced in useQueries.ts, no explicit deleteUploadedFile endpoint is confirmed in the visible backend Motoko code.

hallucinated_features.description: Client-side OCR text extraction implemented in frontend/src/lib/ocrExtraction.ts using regex pattern matching on raw file text.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint explicitly states all OCR logic must remain within the single Motoko actor. Moving OCR to the frontend violates this constraint and was not requested.
